opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I need this Hep B shot for my hospital placement tomorrow, but I am absolutely terrified of needles and I keep hyperventilating when I see one.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I have to be vaccinated tonight to start my clinical placement at 7am tomorrow, but I had a full panic attack trying to get it done at a pharmacy earlier today and couldn't go through with it.

symptom_narrative.onset: the panic started earlier today when I tried to attend a pharmacy clinic for the shot
symptom_narrative.duration: on and off through the day, worse now that I have to get it done
symptom_narrative.character: my heart pounds, I start hyperventilating, I shake and I feel like I can't go through with it whenever I see or think about the needle
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: it feels overwhelming — I go to pieces the moment a needle comes out
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: it's all about the needle — I'm fine otherwise
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: comes on the instant I'm confronted with the injection
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: looking away, having someone talk me through it, not seeing the needle
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: seeing the needle or the medical bag
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: shaking, tearfulness, fast breathing, racing heart
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've always been terrified of needles and I've fainted or nearly fainted with injections before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm fully able to work and look after myself — this is only about getting the injection done

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: severe fear of needles (I've nearly fainted getting injections before)
past_medical_history.how_managed: usually avoid injections or need someone to talk me through them

allergies_as_reported.substance: no known allergies to vaccines or medicines

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: starting a clinical placement tomorrow morning and needs occupational Hepatitis B clearance; very anxious about the deadline

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: wants the vaccine administered tonight, whatever it takes, so the placement is not cancelled

communication_style.typical_message_style: urgent, frightened, focused on the needle and the deadline

objective_data_offered.value: visibly shaking and tearful, breathing rapidly, looking away from the camera and the medical bag
she says her heart is pounding and she keeps hyperventilating whenever the needle is mentioned
she has seated herself on the floor leaning against the couch because she is worried she might faint
